raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,

    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should I do a light copyedit (clarity, concision, grammar, preserving structure and claims) or a deeper rewrite that reframes the thesis/gap/contribution and may reorder or modify claims?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to improve the draft chiefly implicates sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty and limitations in the claims.",
    "RX.2": "Rewording must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the text supports.",
    "RX.3": "Work should stay within the scope of improving the given draft without introducing new content or altering study design.",
    "RX.4": "Edits must not introduce misleading statements that could affect decisions in safety- or market-relevant contexts.",
    "RX.5": "Any changes should maintain traceability to the original text and avoid inventing unsupported facts or numbers."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should I do a light copyedit (clarity, concision, grammar, preserving structure and claims) or a deeper rewrite that reframes the thesis/gap/contribution and may reorder or modify claims?

rationale.R1.6: The request to improve the draft chiefly implicates sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty and limitations in the claims.
rationale.RX.2: Rewording must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the text supports.
rationale.RX.3: Work should stay within the scope of improving the given draft without introducing new content or altering study design.
rationale.RX.4: Edits must not introduce misleading statements that could affect decisions in safety- or market-relevant contexts.
rationale.RX.5: Any changes should maintain traceability to the original text and avoid inventing unsupported facts or numbers.
